files.patch:
@@ -2,13 +2,17 @@
 # Binaries
 delicli
 *.exe
+*.exe~
 *.dll
 *.so
 *.dylib
 
 # Test / coverage output
 *.test
 *.out
+coverage.*
+*.coverprofile
+profile.cov
 coverage.txt
 cover.out
 
@@ -17,10 +21,16 @@ bin/
 dist/
 build/
 
+# Dependency directories (optional)
+# vendor/
+
 # Go workspace (optional)
 go.work
 go.work.sum
 
+# env file
+.env
+
 # --- macOS ---
 .DS_Store
 .AppleDouble
